title: Add more than 20 boards to a dashboard

posts.author: RENAN (AZEVEDO)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, i’m controlling a model with more than 50 projects. Each one of then with your own structure.

When I tried to build a view in a dashboard using a calendar, I couldn’t mark all of them. So I had to creat more then 1 calendar, and thats not effective.

Can we solve this?

screenshot monday1884×920 137 KB
